items.name_cn:
DIOR Lady Horizontal Lady D-Joy!!️
The Lady D-Joy bag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from creamy white diamond quilted calfskin, it features a light gold-finished metal "D.I.O.R." charm to elevate the style, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. With a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Size: 26 x 13.5 x 5 cm
9250

items.name_cn:
Dior New Tote ❤ Large
This bag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine calfskin, it features a classic quilted pattern with a signature large diamond quilting. The elegant design is timeless. The handles are adjustable in length and adorned with a detachable gunmetal DIOR letter. Lined with velvet, it includes a zip pocket and a slip pocket. The side metal clasp can connect the two straps to change the bag's shape, while the long strap can be threaded through the metal ring on the other side to bring the two sides closer together. Stylish and chic!
Model: 1188
Size: 37×43×22cm

items.name_cn:
Dior Nolita Bag
A fashionably elegant silhouette reinterpreting Dior's modern elegance.
Featuring a structured top handle with vintage gold-finish metal hardware, accented with a sliding D.I.O.R. charm for a lively touch.
The video shows the medium size with a drawstring closure. The practical interior features a card slot, paired with an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Size: 28 x 25 x 5cm

specs.rawTitle:
Dior Nolita Bag

Size: 28 x 25 x 5cm

items.name_en: Dior Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Shoulder Bag Small [White]
items.name_cn:
Dior Top-tier Imported Original Cowhide Shoulder Bag Small [White]
This CD Besace handbag is a new arrival for the season, debuting at the 2024 Spring/Summer Couture Show. It features a stylish silhouette with a subtle vintage charm, making it unique. Crafted from white cowhide, the flap is adorned with a striking gold-finished metal CD logo. The interior is spacious and practical. The small size comes with an adjustable cowhide shoulder strap, allowing for shoulder or crossbody wear, and can be paired with various casual or elegant styles this season.
Front adorned with CD logo
Flap opening
Interior compartment features a zip pocket and slip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap [6]
Dimensions: 24 x 15 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 wallet, 1 card holder, 1 mobile phone, and sunglasses

items.name_en: Dior top-tier imported original factory embroidery shoulder bag, new Dior Besace series🖤 super charming 😑 the new handbag reveals a soft luxurious temperament~ the gold CD logo buckle adds a touch of eye-catching high-class feeling to the simple design 🌚 both black and Monogram styles are very durable and good-looking~ every time you wear it, you can feel the soft lines and graceful design language!

items.name_cn: Dior/women's bag

items.name_en: Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Oblique"
items.name_cn:
Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Oblique"
This Hobo Avenue mini bag is a new arrival from the Fall 2023 Ready-to-Wear collection, enriching the 30 Montaigne line with a vintage charm. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, it comes with two detachable pouches for practical versatility. The elegant design features a leather and chain strap finished with matching enamel CD links. It can be worn on the shoulder, adding a finishing touch to various looks this season.
Front featuring matching enamel CD logo
Spacious compartment
2 detachable pouches, one with a zip closure and 3 card slots
Chain strap section finished with matching enamel CD links
Model: 2336
Size: 21×13×5cm

items.name_cn:
Dior❤ Medium Travel Nomad Clutch
This season's new clutch bag fuses multiple elements, making it a stylish statement piece. Crafted from black calfskin! It features a distinctive oversized woven quilted effect. The spacious, flexible design can hold a mobile phone and various small daily items. It is easy to carry by hand or on the shoulder, with metal rings on the sides, allowing it to be paired with a Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
Fits various iPhone models and wallets
Size: 22×13×9.5cm
Model: S5554

items.name_cn:
Dior❤️ Toujours Handbag [Medium Brown]
This Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a casual and practical design. Crafted from brown calfskin, it is detailed with oversized woven stitching. The spacious interior compartments with a small pocket keep daily essentials neatly organized. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure and adjustable sides to elevate the style. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy carrying.
CD Lock and strap closure
DIOR charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2821
Size: 28.5x19x21.5cm
